def is_limerick(text):
    # Regular expression to match the AABBA rhyme scheme pattern
    pattern = r"^(?:(?:(?:\b\w+\b)(?=\w{3,}\b))\s*\n\s*){5}$
    if re.match(pattern, text, re.MULTILINE):
        return True
    return False
